subject: summary of harry's testimony and recommendation for briefing

emails.subject: Re: Summary of Harry's testimony and recommendation for briefing
emails.subject_base: Summary of Harry's testimony and recommendation for briefing
emails.body: Re: Summary of Harry's testimony and recommendation for briefing Harry: You clearly did a fantastic job, particularly under the circumstances described by Leslie. Thanks a million for your help--we really needed it--and you managed to leave with your credibility intact, to boot. And thanks. too, to Leslie. The EES piece of the California puzzle is extremely challenging (as you know) and your and Harry's efforts are greatly appreciated. I can cover the hearings on Monday and Tuesday. Thanks again. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Summary of Harry's testimony and recommendation for briefing
emails.subject_base: Summary of Harry's testimony and recommendation for briefing
emails.body: thanks. We just an improperly issued subpoena filed against us (ENA and EES) in the California gas complaint at FERC, sought by our good friends SCE. They ignored the folks on the service list and sent it to Jim Keller and Christian Yoder. So now we are supposed to send them all kinds of pricing info ASAP. We will be fighting this one on Monday, and also working on coming up with something for the Hearing Examiner on the 3 cent case, who wants Enron's summer electric on peak pricing forecasts. Things are getting out of control!! Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 04/21/01 02:18 PM
